$comment: Schema version 1.0 - Payload Types (BL2). Workflow-scoped data-shape declarations referenced by consequences via params_type.
title: Blueprint Payload Types Schema
description: Shape of a single payload type entry inside a workflow's payload_types: block.

payload_type.description: A map of field name to type descriptor. Field values may be scalar type strings or structured constraint objects.

oneOf.description: Scalar type descriptor. Recognized forms: string, integer, boolean, object, array<T>, enum{a,b,c}. Whitespace-delimited constraints may follow (e.g. 'string (min_length=1, optional)').
